tasks.description: Diagnosed cpm-report-agent v1.0.15 test failure root cause: Babel state machine checkpoint corruption from old session. Found correct test path via workspace orchestrator delegation.
Verified cpm-report-agent v1.0.15 runs to completion via workspace orchestrator. Full 7-section dashboard rendered, no errors, isTestRun branch confirmed working.
Fixed cowork-tracker.ts: moved 'use agent' inside run(), changed spread to Object.assign, removed guildTools import and guild_get_me calls.

Diagnosed universal-tracker v2.0.0 failures: INIT mode crashes on blocked fetch, dashboard returns empty due to fetch block + no API key. Source in main repo was v1 using wrong @guild-sdk/agent package.

Full rewrite of universal-tracker.ts v3: @guild-sdk/agent -> @guildai/agents-sdk, agent() export, 'use agent' inside run(), Object.assign tools, try-catch on all fetch calls, static fallbacks, no task.llm.generateText() calls.
Deployed universal-tracker v2.0.1 to Guild, scaffolded deploy directory, resolved clone vs init confusion, verified agent returns full help menu via workspace orchestrator.
Fixed cowork-tracker.ts Babel SpreadElement errors: replaced all 7 spread operators inside run() with Object.assign/concat. Deployed v1.0.2, added to workspace, verified dashboard renders correctly.
